title: Mock Town Shows Its Teeth
description: After the humiliation in Mock Town, Blackbeard declares that pirate dreams will never die, sharply opposing Bellamy’s New Age cynicism.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Nami, Blackbeard, Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate. After the humiliation in Mock Town, Blackbeard declares that pirate dreams will never die, sharply opposing Bellamy’s New Age cynicism.

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: The marines these days sure are generous,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Somebody get these losers outta my sight!

summary: After the humiliation in Mock Town, Blackbeard declares that pirate dreams will never die, sharply opposing Bellamy’s New Age cynicism.
